# Profile Builder - Profiles - Edit, Basic Jig, & Mass Edit – AYCD

Profile Builder - Profiles - Edit, Basic Jig, & Mass Edit

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13264022167703-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Edit-Basic-Jig-Mass-Edit/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



==============================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/1500080569202/crw1.png)

**Crewie**

March 21, 2023 17:56

Introduction
------------

Jigging allows you to create multiple unique profiles from one by slightly altering the original profile. Jigging your profiles can help you bypass websites with one order per customer detection. There are multiple different ways to jig your profiles; you can use our Jig or Mass Edit dialogs to customise the alterations.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   One of the ways to jig a profile is by editing an individual profile. You can edit a profile's Name, Email, Phone Number, and Address; this is the least efficient way to jig a profile.
*   Rather than using the jig options under Edit Profile, it is more efficient to use the Edit > Jig option to have more control over what jig options are used.
*   Mass Edit allows you to edit specific fields of a profile across an unlimited amount of selected profiles. Mass Edit can be especially useful if you are looking to adjust a field with a common value across many profiles or even more so when you are taking advantage of [expressions](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360058115713)
    .
*   If you need advice on what jigs to use, we recommend checking out [AYCD Pro](https://aycd.io/checkout/product/aycdpro)
    , a cookgroup where we can advise you on what works for every site. 

Edit Profile
------------

1\. Navigate over to the **Profiles** section of Profile Builder.

2\. In the table, select the profile you wish to jig.

3\. Click the **Edit** button, then click **Edit** again. 

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39325534533271)

4\. In the Edit dialog, you can make changes and jig specific fields in your profile..

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39304158764439)

Basic Jig
---------

1\. Navigate over to the Profiles section of Profile Builder.

2\. In the table, select the profiles you wish to jig.

3\. Click the **Tools** button, then select **Basic** **Jig** in the dropdown dialog.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39325578813079)

4\. In the Jig dialog you can make changes and jig-specific profile parts. Below are the explanations for each section of the dialog. 

**Create in Category:** This allows you to specify a new or existing category for the jigged profiles to be created in.

**Number of Jigs for each Profile:** This allows you to specify the number of individual jigs of each selected profile. If you have five profiles selected to jig and you put down two, it will create ten jigged profiles.

**The Checkboxes:** The checkboxes for Name, Email, Phone Address, Billing Address, and Shipping Address allow you to specify which profile fields you want to be jigged. If you unselect one, Profile Builder will not change that field.

**Only Checkout Once:** This will allow you to change the "Only Checkout Once" option in your profile. If this setting is turned on, it means if you are running the same profile on multiple tasks in your bot, and 1 of those tasks checks out, it will stop the other task.  

**CatchAll Email Domain:** If you would like to quickly assign a random catch-all email to all of your profiles, type in your catch-all in this format: "@yourcatchallhere" another example: "@aycd.io"

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/16208017542551)

Mass Edit
---------

1\. Navigate over to the Profiles section of Profile Builder.

2\. In the table, select the profiles you wish to jig.

3\. Click the **Tools** button, then select **Mass Edit/Jig** in the dropdown dialog.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39325534534295)

4\. To make changes to the profiles, you need to click the checkbox beside the field you want to alter, then type in the change you want to make. The Mass Edit dialog is where you use Expressions; more information can be found on them [here](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360058115713)
.

# TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Tools - Copy With Browser Data – AYCD

TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Tools - Copy With Browser Data

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18230044821911-TabSentry-Tasks-Browsers-Tools-Copy-With-Browser-Data/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



======================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/1500080569202/crw1.png)

**Crewie**

October 12, 2023 19:12

Introduction
------------

You can use the Copy with browser data to copy extensions with their config, cookies, and browser settings to new tasks. This avoids the hassle of creating new tasks if you want everything to be the same.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   You must have already created tasks to use the copy feature.
*   If you do not want to copy over the browser data, leave the box unselected.

Copy With Browser Data
----------------------

1. Navigate to the Tasks section of Tab Sentry. 

2\. Select the tasks you wish to copy; you can use CTRL + Click, Shift + Click, or click the box on the left-hand side.

3\. Click **Edit**.   
4\. Then click **Copy**.  
![Screenshot 2023-10-12 200730.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18230048331799)5\. In the following dialog, input the category in which you want the copied tasks to be located. Then, input the number of copies you wish to create. And finally, tick the box **Copy selected tasks with browser data**.  
![2023-10-12 20_10_17-TabSentry v1.0.0 EAP Build 52.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18230064292119)  
6\. Click Save, and TabSentry will create your copies!

# TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Actions - Reload / Duplicate Current Tab – AYCD

TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Actions - Reload / Duplicate Current Tab

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18206680979095-TabSentry-Tasks-Browsers-Actions-Reload-Duplicate-Current-Tab/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



========================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

October 11, 2023 21:47

Introduction
------------

Utilizing the action menu, you can easily reload and duplicate the current tabs across multiple tasks simultaneously, eliminating the need to click on each browser individually.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   You need to have tasks created and running to use the Actions Reload/Duplicate settings.

Reload / Duplicate Current Tab
------------------------------

1. Navigate over to the Browsers section of TabSentry in Tasks. This section has an icon that looks like a globe titled **Browsers** when you hover over it.

2\. Select the Tasks from the table you want to Reload or Duplicate the Current Tab for.

3\. Right-click, select Actions, then **Reload Current Tab** or **Duplicate Current Tab** from the menu.![11.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18206708361751)

# TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Edit - Edit / Move / Copy / Delete – AYCD

TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Edit - Edit / Move / Copy / Delete

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18253934486423-TabSentry-Tasks-Browsers-Edit-Edit-Move-Copy-Delete/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



========================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

October 13, 2023 18:03

Introduction
------------

You have the flexibility to utilize the editing features, allowing you to edit existing tasks, copy browsers along with their sessions and extension configurations, move them, or delete them as needed.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

In order to use the browser edit functions, you will need to have browsers created, to learn more on that you can read this guide: 

Using The Edit Function
-----------------------

1\. To edit the tasks **select** the tasks you want to edit.

2\. Right click, and click **Edit**.![31.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253911152663)

4\. The edit dialogue will then appear which has the same exact UI as the create task UI ![32.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253924488983)

5\. Select the checkbox and modify the fields you wish to change; this will overwrite the current field values.

Using The Move Function
-----------------------

1\. To move tasks **select** the tasks you want to move and right click, click **Edit**.

![31.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253911152663)

2\. Click **Move**.

3\. Provide the new category name where you'd prefer to relocate the existing tasks. If a category with that name doesn't currently exist, a new category with that name will be generated for you.

![33.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253920854039)

Using The Copy Function
-----------------------

1\. To copy tasks **select** the tasks you want to copy and right click, click **Edit**.

![31.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253911152663)

2\. Click **Copy**.

3\. Enter the **category name** you would like the newly copied tasks to go to, enter the **number of copies** and **toggle** whether or not you would like browser data carried over as well. 

![34.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18255101652887)

Using The Delete Function
-------------------------

1\. To delete tasks **select** the tasks you want to delete and right click, click **Edit**.

![31.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18253911152663)

2\. Click **Delete**.

![35.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18255952821527)

3\. Click **Yes** to confirm the deletion.

# Profile Builder - Profiles - Tools - Mass Distribute – AYCD

Profile Builder - Profiles - Tools - Mass Distribute

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/21341444931607-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Tools-Mass-Distribute/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



======================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

February 14, 2024 09:20

Introduction
------------

You can utilize the Mass Distribute Tool to replace various values in multiple billing profiles efficiently. This is useful when you want to replace multiple emails, addresses, cards, and other areas of your profile.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   You need to have existing profiles to use the Mass Distribute Tool. [Click here to learn how to create profiles.](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13258919736343)
    
*   You can use the Mass Distribute Tool in combination with Copy to Clipboard Settings to transfer generated account emails to your billing profiles. [Click here to learn more about Copy to Clipboard Settings.](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13909056274199)
    

Mass Distribute
---------------

1\. Navigate to the Profiles section in Profile Builder under Profiles. This section has an icon that looks like a book with a person on it titled **Profiles** when you hover over it.

2\. Select the Profiles you want to mass distribute info to in the table.

3\. Click on the Tools button at the top right of the view or right-click on the table and click on **Tools**. This will bring up the **Tools** dialog for Profiles. Select the **Mass Distribute** option and then click the **Start** button. Alternatively, you can click the **Edit** button and then the **Mass Distribute** button.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39329057886359)

4\. The Mass Distribute dialog will appear. Input your list of data in the **Values** field. Input one value per line.

5\. Specify if you want to update the billing address, shipping address, or both sections of the profiles with the **Update Billing/Shipping Address** checkboxes.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39329016124311)

6\. If you provide fewer values than selected profiles, the same values will be distributed to multiple profiles. A dialog will appear confirming you want to continue.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39329057888023)

7\. You can mass distribute new card information across your profiles. Refer to the image below for proper formatting examples.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21341582890391)

8\. After configuring the dialog, click the **Save** button. Your Profiles will now contain the newly distributed data.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/39329057891223)

### Articles in this section

*   [Profile Builder - Profiles - Create / Generate / Import / Export (Format / Custom CSV) Profiles](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13258919736343-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Create-Generate-Import-Export-Format-Custom-CSV-Profiles)
    
*   [Profile Builder - Profiles - Edit, Basic Jig, & Mass Edit](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13264022167703-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Edit-Basic-Jig-Mass-Edit)
    
*   [Profile Builder - Profiles - Expressions & Expression Templates](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360058115713-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Expressions-Expression-Templates)
    
*   [Profile Builder - Profiles - Tools - Mass Distribute](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/21341444931607-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Tools-Mass-Distribute)
    
*   [Profile Builder - Profiles - Tools - AI Address Jig](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/16039185026583-Profile-Builder-Profiles-Tools-AI-Address-Jig)

*   [Profile Builder - Cards - Tasks - AMEX (Business) (Generate, Import, Lock)](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/38616453675031-Profile-Builder-Cards-Tasks-AMEX-Business-Generate-Import-Lock)

# AutoSolve AI Extension - Getting Started Guide (Dashboard Download) – AYCD

AutoSolve AI Extension - Getting Started Guide (Dashboard Download)

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/10245877163415-AutoSolve-AI-Extension-Getting-Started-Guide-Dashboard-Download/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



======================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

November 15, 2022 18:59

### What is the AutoSolve AI Extension?

AutoSolve AI is a browser extension that allows you to harness the power of AutoSolve AI in your own Chrome browser! It connects directly to AutoSolve AI and does not require a subscription to the Toolbox or AutoSolve.

[Installation](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/10245877163415-AutoSolve-AI-Extension-Getting-Started-Guide-Dashboard-Download#h_01GHYBZQX8EB8SRDV4BEY0W2MB)
 | [Extension Controls](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/10245877163415-AutoSolve-AI-Extension-Getting-Started-Guide-Dashboard-Download#h_01GHYGFFDDPXBJ7VCRWBRCA353)
 

### Installation

In order to install and use the AutoSolve AI extension you need to meet a few requirements.

*   That you are using or have installed a Chromium-based browser such as [Google Chrome](https://www.google.com/chrome/)
    , [Microsoft Edge](https://www.microsoft.com/edge)
    , [Brave](https://brave.com/download/)
    , [Wavebox](https://wavebox.io/)
    , and more.
*   An AutoSolve AI Subscription. This will only give you access to the Extension and AI Keys, if you want to take advantage of all the features AutoSolve AI has to offer, you should purchase the Toolbox and AutoSolve as well.

With those requirements met, you can begin to install and use the AutoSolve AI Extension.

1.  Download the AutoSolve AI Extension from the [AutoSolve AI Dashboard](https://fuzzy.ngrok.io/account#autosolveai)
    . 
2.  Unzip the folder in the permanent place you want to install the extension. This will save time and make updating the extension easier. 
3.  In your Chromium-based browser go to Chrome Settings > More Tools > Extensions or go directly to chrome://extensions/.  
    ![ASAI_chrome_extensions.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248614298007)
4.  From this page use to Toggle to turn on Developer Mode. This will allow you to load extensions not found on the Chrome Web Store into your browser for you to use. Depending on the browser you are using it may be in a different location, but the name should not be changed from Developer mode.  
    ![ASAI_Enable_Dev.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248614296087)
5.  After you enable Developer Mode it will show some new buttons on the left. Click on Load Unpacked.   
    ![ASAI_Load_Unpacked.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248623095447)
6.  This will open a window asking you to select the directory of the extension. You will need to navigate to the location where you unzipped the files. Click on the folder autosolve-ai-chrome-extension and then press Select Folder.
7.  With that complete, the extension should be successfully installed! You can access installed extensions by clicking on the Extensions icon and clicking on AutoSolve AI, and you can also pin it to your browser using the Pin icon.  
    ![ASAI_Pin_extension.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248569388183)
8.  Clicking on the AutoSolve AI extension will prompt you to log in, and once you are logged in, you can let AutoSolve AI handle reCaptcha challenges in your browser for you!   
    ![ASAI_Testing.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248576461975)

### Extension Controls

The AutoSolve AI extension has minimal settings to interact with. You can turn the whole extension off so that it does not interact with your Challenges. You can turn the Auto Click functionality on and off, which will automatically click and solve any challenges it detects on the page. Lastly, you can log out of the extension.  
![AI_EXT_Controls.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/10248573847703)

*   [AutoSolve AI Extension - Getting Started Guide](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4418385024023-AutoSolve-AI-Extension-Getting-Started-Guide)

# AutoSolve AI - AutoSolve AI Desktop – AYCD

AutoSolve AI - AutoSolve AI Desktop

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/8408707994007-AutoSolve-AI-AutoSolve-AI-Desktop/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



=======================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

August 25, 2022 00:18

What is AutoSolve AI Desktop?
-----------------------------

AutoSolve AI Desktop is an extension of AutoSolve AI that brings the reliable solving ability of AutoSolve AI to any challenge visible on your screen. This will allow you to harness the power of AutoSolve AI in browsers where the AutoSolve AI Extension isn't available.

[Requirements](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/8408707994007-AutoSolve-AI-AutoSolve-AI-Desktop#h_01GBBMCR5TDJQK2V15GYN37721)
 | [Enable/Disable](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/8408707994007-AutoSolve-AI-AutoSolve-AI-Desktop#h_01GBBMD081Y0A1SH6FK1J4SGYQ)
 | [Using AutoSolve AI Desktop](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/8408707994007-AutoSolve-AI-AutoSolve-AI-Desktop#h_01GBBMD7207KT49W29CTS3AS0Q)

Requirements
------------

*   In order to use AutoSolve AI Desktop, you will need to have a Toolbox, AutoSolve, and AutoSolve AI Subscription.
*   Be running OneClick 2.6.4 or newer.

Enable/Disable
--------------

In order to Enable AutoSolve AI Desktop:

1\. Open OneClick and go to the AI section, and then to the AI Desktop tab. This tab has an icon that looks like a computer monitor.  

2\. To enable AutoSolve AI, select at least one screen from the connected screens listed there.

3\. After you select a screen, click Enable AutoSolve AI Desktop.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21367566557591)

_On macOS once a challenge is visible, you will see a prompt to enable certain system permissions. You must follow the prompts and enable the permissions for the Toolbox before AutoSolve AI Desktop can solve challenges._

To Disable AutoSolve AI Desktop, you can unselect the selected screens or use the Disable button.

Using AutoSolve AI Desktop
--------------------------

After you have enabled AutoSolve AI Desktop on a screen, any challenge that is fully visible and unobstructed on the screen will attempt to be solved one at a time after your mouse has been idle for longer than 1 second. You can use this to solve challenges in Safari, Mozilla Firefox, or any other place where you may receive a visible reCaptcha v2 challenge.

![AutoSolveAIDesktop.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/8433478528023)

# AutoSolve AI - AI Desktop – AYCD

AutoSolve AI - AI Desktop

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/14341544626455-AutoSolve-AI-AI-Desktop/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



====================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

May 03, 2023 20:52

Introduction
------------

You can use AI Desktop to solve any reCaptcha v2 challenge that is fully visible on the screen. AI Desktop requires no additional developer work and is compatible with any solver, with the challenge fully visible on screen.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   To use AutoSolve AI Desktop, you will need a Toolbox, AutoSolve, and AutoSolve AI Subscription. [Captcha Pass](https://aycd.io/checkout/product/captchapass?referralCode=ZENDESK)
     includes all three products at a discounted rate.

Enable AI Desktop
-----------------

1\. Navigate to the **AI Desktop** section in OneClick.

2\. To enable AutoSolve AI Desktop, select **at least one screen** from the connected screens listed.

3\. After you select a screen(s), click **Enable AutoSolve AI Desktop**.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/14342183580439)

_Once a challenge is visible on macOS, you will see a prompt to enable certain system permissions. You must follow the prompts and enable the permissions for the Toolbox before AutoSolve AI Desktop can solve challenges._

Disable AI Desktop
------------------

1\. Navigate to the **AI Desktop** section in OneClick.

2\. To disable AutoSolve AI Desktop, unselect at least one screen from the connected screens listed or click **Disable AutoSolve AI Desktop**.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/14341497035543)

Save Debug Screenshot
---------------------

1\. If you have an issue with AI Desktop, in a ticket, we may ask you to use the **Save Debug Screenshot** button with a captcha in view that is failing to solve. This allows us to troubleshoot and fix any issues that come up quickly.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/14342180061335)

Using AI Desktop
----------------

1\. After you have enabled AutoSolve AI Desktop on a screen, any fully visible and unobstructed challenge will attempt to be solved one at a time after your mouse has been idle for longer than 1 second. You can use this to solve challenges in Safari, Mozilla Firefox, a bot solver(s) window, or any other place where you may receive a visible reCaptcha v2. 

![AutoSolveAIDesktop.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/14341980381463)

# AutoSolve AI Extension - Getting Started Guide – AYCD

AutoSolve AI Extension - Getting Started Guide

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/4418385024023-AutoSolve-AI-Extension-Getting-Started-Guide/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



=============================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

January 07, 2022 23:07

Introduction
------------

The AutoSolve AI Extension is a browser extension that allows you to automate the solving of captchas you experience during your everyday browsing in your own Chrome Browser.

Setup & Requirements
--------------------

*   The AutoSolve AI extension can only be used with an AutoSolve AI subscription.
*   The extension can only be used on Chromium-based browsers such as [Google Chrome](https://www.google.com/chrome/)
     or [Wavebox](https://wavebox.io/)
    .

Getting Started
---------------

1\. Go to the AYCD Toolbox and click the download button on the AutoSolve AI Extension.

![Toolbox-Download_Required.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418462426391)

2\. Click on the Play button icon. This will open the folder where the extension has been downloaded to. You can leave this window open to access the folder path when you need it later.

![ASAI_play_icon.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418478411543)

3\. Go to your Chromium based browser. Go to Chrome Settings > More Tools > Extensions or go directly to chrome://extensions/.

![ASAI_chrome_extensions.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418470572439)

4\. Click on Developer Mode to enable Developer Mode for extensions. This will allow you to load extensions not found on the Chrome Web Store into your browser for you to use. _Depending on your browser, it may be in a different location, but the name should not be changed from Developer mode._

![ASAI_Enable_Dev.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418464122775)

5\. After you enable Developer Mode, it will show some new buttons on the left. Click on Load Unpacked.

![ASAI_Load_Unpacked.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418478523287)

6\. A dialog will open asking you to select the extension's directory. You can navigate to the Toolbox app folder manually or copy the path from the window that shows when you press the play button. Click on the folder **autosolve-ai-chrome-extension** and then press Select Folder.

![ASAI_LoadUnpacked.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418478481815)

7\.  The extension should be successfully installed! You can access installed extensions by clicking on the Extensions icon and clicking on AutoSolve AI, and you can also pin it to your browser using the Pin icon.

![ASAI_Pin_extension.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418498018583)

8\. Clicking on the AutoSolve AI extension will prompt you to log in, and once you are logged in, you can let AutoSolve AI handle reCaptcha challenges in your browser for you!   
![ASAI_Testing.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418534447383)

Updating AutoSolve AI Extension
-------------------------------

Updates to the AutoSolve AI extension are easy and are done through the Toolbox with only one additional step in the browser.

1\. When there is an update available, the AutoSolve AI Extension will show that there is a pending update along with the warning triangle beside it. Press the update icon in the middle will begin to download the update.  
![ASAI_Update_Required.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418529329559)

2\. Once you finish downloading the update in the Toolbox, go to the extensions page chrome://extensions/ and press the refresh icon. It will update the AutoSolve AI extension with the latest version and will show reloaded in the bottom left.  
![ASAI_Reloading.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4418529414295)

# TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Actions - Mass URL Change – AYCD

TabSentry - Tasks - Browsers - Actions - Mass URL Change

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18258218844567-TabSentry-Tasks-Browsers-Actions-Mass-URL-Change/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



============================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

October 13, 2023 20:03

Introduction
------------

Utilizing the action menu, you can easily mass change your Task(s) to new URLs. 

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   The data in all Toolbox programs is secured and encrypted automatically. Given the sensitive nature of Billing and Credit Card information, you can further secure data in TabSentry with a [Password Lock](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/7446003478039)
    .
*   You can input multiple links when using the Mass URL Change Action.
*   You can configure Keyboard Shortcuts in Settings to quickly trigger an action, such as Mass URL Change. [Click here to learn more about Keyboard Shortcuts.](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/18345131620631)
    

Mass URL Change
---------------

1. Navigate over to the Browsers section of TabSentry in Tasks. This section has an icon that looks like a globe titled **Browsers** when you hover over it.

2\. Select the Tasks you want to Mass URL Change from the table. Right Click > Actions > Mass URL Change. This will open the Mass URL Change dialog.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18258029431191)

3\. Input the links you want to load in the selected Tasks in the **URLs** field. If you are providing multiple links, include one link per line. 

4\. If you want to keep the current links assigned to your Tasks and add the new links to your Tasks, click the **Keep current URLs and add new URLs** checkbox. If you want to replace the existing links on your Tasks, do not click this checkbox. 

5\. After configuring the dialog, click the **Load URLs** button.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/18258076128023)

6\. Your new link(s) have been successfully added to your Tasks.

# How to update your Payment Card – AYCD

How to update your Payment Card

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360038113474-How-to-update-your-Payment-Card/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

November 08, 2019 05:00

Your AYCD Account gives you access to all of the products within our toolbox. Ensuring that your payment information is up to date is an important part of maintaining your subscription with us.

Failing to keep your billing details up to date may result in your subscription automatically canceling when it is unable to charge your payment card. To update your payment card for all your AYCD subscriptions you will start by:

1.  Login to your AYCD account on [here](https://aycd.io/account)
     with your Email and Password.
2.  Once logged into your account go to the [Billing](https://aycd.io/account#billing)
     menu option on the sidebar.
3.  Once there you can click on Update Card For All Subscriptions to enter the new card details for your account.
    *   This will update the card that is being billed for ALL subscriptions.

![Billing_1.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/1500003011921/Billing_1.png)

![Billing_2.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360104010053/Billing_2.png)

*   [How to Cancel your AYCD Subscription](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360038113374-How-to-Cancel-your-AYCD-Subscription)
    
*   [How to update your Payment Card](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360038113474-How-to-update-your-Payment-Card)

# OneClick - Account Ratings – AYCD

OneClick - Account Ratings

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



=====================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

April 28, 2022 19:23

Introduction
------------

The accounts rating system will assign a letter rating from F at the lowest to S at the highest. The rating will help you better determine the quality of your accounts and the browsers you are farming. Each section below will cover a factor we use to provide a rating.

[Account Ratings](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2C692M44BR6BTZE88SXP2)
 | [ReCaptcha Testing Results](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2CH7BDDY1PGSG06G7V8VT)
 | [2FA Status](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2CTB510YTQG4AVD43WRPR)
 | [YouTube Status](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2DANJTWA32DRW50D6QD0B)
 | [Total Farming Time](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2DJCJ17MMPHX4AHZ4GJG9)
 | [Length of Time in OneClick](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2H30YWFF0NYFD2BNSEDEM)

### Account Rating

[Getting a Rating](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2HEK0YBKWC3DPD0DP4S5Y)
 | [Viewing Your Rating](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G1S2HPY530D9HJWY370DPFEZ)
 | [Updating Your Rating](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/5751258079895-OneClick-Account-Ratings#h_01G4ED08SKPS3NZ3298DG6TT2E)

#### Getting a Rating

For your account to receive a rating in OneClick, you must have run it on a farming cycle for at least 1 minute. Until a browser has been run, it will display a dash indicating it has not received a rating yet.  
![GetARating.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6310254399639)

#### Viewing Your Rating

You can easily view the rating on your accounts under the Rating column in OneClick. If you want more information on the rating, you can click on it, and it will show you a tooltip containing the status of each rating factor for your account described using the following icons.  
![warning-circle.svg](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6460676749719) The red circle with an exclamation point symbol indicates the status of this factor has not been checked yet or is expired.  
![close.svg](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6460705629079) The Red X symbol indicates a negative status of a factor such as failed reCaptcha V2 One-Click or a YouTube Account Ban.  
![check.svg](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6460659357335) The Blue checkmark symbol indicates a positive status of a factor such as successful reCaptcha v2 One-Click, or 2FA enabled on an account.   
![ClickAndView.gif](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6353122035863)

#### Updating Your Rating

Each browser's rating is updated automatically by OneClick once the browser goes to sleep or is stopped.

### ReCaptcha Testing Results

The first two factors that the rating system will look at are the one-click results of your reCaptcha V2 test and the score of your reCaptcha V3 test. These two tests play a big part in determining the trust of your account as it helps to demonstrate the real-world results of requesting the particular captcha types.  
![ReCaptchaSuccess.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6105701060759)

The results of the ReCaptcha Test will expire after 7 days leaving behind a warning on the rating indicating that you need to test the account again. Expiring the results of the tests helps keep the results up to date and the rating as accurate as possible.  
![ExpiredResultsV2.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6460832056983)  
![ExpiredResults.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6310522744599)

### 2FA Status

The third factor that we look at to determine the rating of an account is whether that account has Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) enabled. The 2FA status gets checked while the account is farming. Enabling 2FA is a process that cannot be automated and needs to be enabled manually, which helps increase the trust of the Google Account. To enable 2FA, you will first need to add a phone number to the account. Then you can enable 2FA and add the passphrase directly to your account in OneClick, automating the login process and saving you from managing these in an external app like Google Authenticator. You can read about enabling 2FA [here](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13361546549527)
.![2FAEnabled.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6105809507607)

### YouTube Status

The fourth factor that we look at to determine the rating of an account is whether the account can sign in to YouTube. This status gets checked during the farming cycle. Accounts unable to sign in to YouTube are typically unable to do so because they got banned for breaking YouTube's terms of use. Being banned negatively impacts an account's trust, so we factor this into the rating.  
![YouTubeActive.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/6105845179543)

While an account can get one-clicks if it has a YouTube ban, it usually takes significantly longer and is always a negative stain on the account's status.

### Total Farming Time

The fifth factor that we look at to determine the rating of an account is the length of time it has spent farming in OneClick. The length of time an account has spent farming helps define several factors, including the quality of the browsing data in OneClick and its amount. The Total Farming Time is broken into 3 sections that affect your rating:

*   **Bad**: This is an account you have only farmed for less than 360 minutes.
*   **Okay**: This is an account you have farmed for more than 360 minutes but less than 840 minutes.
*   **Good**: This is an account you have farmed for more than 840 minutes.

It is best to not rush the activity onto your accounts by increasing the run time or decreasing the sleeping time between cycles. Instead, following the predetermined and automated times and cycles will yield the best results when increasing trust in your accounts.

### Length of Time in OneClick

The last factor that we look at to determine the rating of an account is the length of time an account has spent in OneClick. This factor helps to show how long a browser history could have existed for. Keeping your accounts farming in the same location is the best practice for building up history and trust for your accounts. Similar to the Total Farm Time, the length of time has been broken into 3 sections that affect your rating:

*   **Bad**: This is an account that has been in OneClick for less than 14 days.
*   **Okay**: This is an account that has been in OneClick for less than 30 days.
*   **Good**: This is an account that has been in OneClick for more than 30 days.

This system is just an estimate of the quality of your account and will be tweaked and adjusted over time. If you have questions or suggestions about the rating system, you can create a ticket to discuss this with a member of our team.

# OneClick - Traffic - Campaigns - Create Campaign / UULE / Import / Export – AYCD

OneClick - Traffic - Campaigns - Create Campaign / UULE / Import / Export

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/21313462266647-OneClick-Traffic-Campaigns-Create-Campaign-UULE-Import-Export/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



==========================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://assets.zendesk.com/hc/assets/default_avatar.png)

**Permanently deleted user**

February 13, 2024 03:18

Introduction
------------

You can create Campaigns to search for specific queries and target specific Domains or Youtube Channels based on a Traffic Action you configure. Based on your Campaigns configuration, the farming algorithm will randomly include your Campaigns.

Setup & Recommendations
-----------------------

*   You need to have tasks created to use Campaigns. [Click here to learn how to create tasks](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/16222455171479)
    .
*   You can provide your own list of queries or generate them with ChatGPT directly in OneClick.

Create Campaign
---------------

1\. Navigate to the Campaign section in OneClick under Traffic. This section has an icon resembling a book with a magnifine glass on it titled **Campaigns** when you hover over it.

2\. Click the **Create** button. The Create Traffic Campaign dialog will appear.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313798309655)

3\. By default, Traffic Campaigns are created in the All **Category**. You can override this and specify a category name to have your Traffic Campaign created into a unique category.

4\. Specify a **Name** for the Campaign.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313811847191)

5\. Specify a Status of the Campaign. Active Campaigns will be used by tasks based on how you configure the campaign in Tasks. Completed Campaigns will not be used by any tasks, you can use this status to create Campaigns you are not ready to run yet. 

6\. Navigate to the **Actions** section in the dialog and click the **Create** button. Then select a Traffic Action Type.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313811849495)

7\. The Create Traffic Action Item dialog will appear. Specify a **Name** for the action.

8\. Optionally, you can specify **Target Domains** or **Target Channels** to use when performing a search. Target Domains are specific website URLs that should be targeted when searching and Target Channels specify a specific channel name to find videos from.

![Create_Traffic_Action_item.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24772218378263)

9\. Navigate to the **Queries** section in the dialog.

![Add_Queries.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24772176486807)

10\. You can provide your own list of queries with the Add Queries button.

11\. By default, Queries are created in the All Category. You can override this and specify a category name to have your Queries created into a unique category.

12\. Input your list of queries in the Queries field. Provide one query per line. After configuring the dialog, click the Save button.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313798331159)

13\. You can generate queries with the **Generate with AI** button. 

14\. By default, Queries are created in the All **Category**. You can override this and specify a category name to have your Queries created into a unique category.

15\. Specify the **Quantity** of text items/queries to generate.

16\. Provide **Context** to ChatGPT to help generate queries. This context should be directly related to the queries you want to use.

![Generate_With_AI.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24772218389655)

17\. Click the **Next** button, then once you have read the confirmation dialog, click **Proceed**.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313959739671)

18\. You have now successfully added queries to the Traffic Action Item. Make sure you've selected the Queries you want to use.

![Add_Queries_Populated.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24772176495127)

19\. If you are making a Google Search Action Item Navigate to the **Advanced** section in the dialog.

20\. Specify a Bounce Rate for your Traffic Action Item. The Bounce Rate is the percentage of searches that quickly leave the target domain after viewing only one page.

21\. Specify the Min/Max Queries During Each Search Activity. This is a range for the number of searches to perform from your list of queries when an action item is being used.

22\. Specify the Min/Max Clicks Per Search Query. This is a range for the number of search results to click on and view per query.

23\. Specify the Allowed Result options using the dropdown. 

24\. Once you have everything configured, click on the Save button.

![Traffic_Action_Advanced.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24772176497943)

25\. You can edit existing Traffic Actions with the edit button or by selecting the action > right-click > edit. You can delete Traffic Actions by selecting the action > right-click > delete. 

26\. You can repeat the above steps to add more Queries. You can add multiple Traffic Actions to one Traffic Campaign.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313959752087)

27\. Navigate to the **Tasks** section of the Create Traffic Campaign dialog. Select which Tasks you want to use to run the Campaign. You can configure the Traffic Campaign based on the options below.![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313959755159)

28\. Navigate to the **Advanced** section of the Create Traffic Campaign dialog. You can set the Minimum Delay in Minutes before this Campaign can be used again by a task.

29\. After configuring the Traffic Campaign dialog, click the **Save** button.

30\. You can view how many **Events** have been recorded using your Traffic Target. Select a Campaign and click the **Events** column item to view the specific query and timestamp used during the farming flow.

![](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/21313997082519)

Modify Task Geolocation with UULE
---------------------------------

If you want to ensure that your Traffic queries originate from a specific geo location, you can modify the UULE of the tasks that will run your created Campaigns. 

1\. Navigate to the Accounts/Solvers section in OneClick under Tasks. This section has an icon that looks like a play button titled Account/Solvers when you hover over it.

2\. Select the task(s) from the table that you want to modify the Geo Location UULE for, then click the Edit > Edit button. This will open the Edit Account/Solver Dialog.

![Edit_Edit.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170815373463)

3\. Click on Traffic. If you select multiple tasks, click the checkbox in order to modify the Geo Location UULE. 

4\. Once you have entered the canonical name or lat, long coordinates of the location to use when performing a search for traffic action click save.

![Save_UULE.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170830883223)

Import
------

1\. Navigate to the Campaign section in OneClick under Traffic. This section has an icon resembling a book with a magnifine glass on it titled **Campaigns** when you hover over it.

2\. Click on **File**, **Import**, and then **JSON**. This will open the Import Items dialog.

![Traffic_Config_Import.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170044272663)

3\. By default, Campaigns are imported to the **All Category**. You can override this and specify a category to have your Campaigns imported into a unique Category.

4\. Click on the blue paper icon and select your Traffic Campaign JSON file.

![Traffic_Import_Dialog.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170044275863)

5\. After configuring the Import Tasks dialog, click the Import button.

Export
------

1\. Navigate to the Campaign section in OneClick under Traffic. This section has an icon resembling a book with a magnifine glass on it titled **Campaigns** when you hover over it.

2\. Select the Campaigns you want to Export. Click on File, Export, and then JSON. This will open the Export Campaigns dialog confirming you want to export the selected Campaigns. Click **Yes** to continue.

![Export_Confirm.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170010882455)

3\. The completed dialog will appear, confirming your Campaigns were successfully exported. Click **Yes** to open the exported file(s) location.

![Completed_Open_File_Location.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/24170044285335)

# How to make a Ticket – AYCD

How to make a Ticket

[Follow](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360039119213-How-to-make-a-Ticket/subscription.html "Opens a sign-in dialog")



==========================================================================================================================================================

![Avatar](https://aycd.zendesk.com/system/photos/361107019153/1AF391AB-1EF4-4C5F-A5C8-3C1B8FD61B65_1_105_c.jpeg)

**Stealthy**

November 18, 2019 05:48

Welcome to AYCD's new ticket system powered by Zendesk.   
  
We have moved away from using Discord based ticket systems and will now be providing support through helpdesk software. Since we know a lot of you have not used Zendesk we wanted to provide a quick guide to help with creating and checking the status of your ticket.

1.  Click this link to access all of our **[guides](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/en-us)
    **. Ensure that you search for your issue before submitting a ticket. Before making a ticket you will want to sign in to your account.   
    ![Ticket_1.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/4402119577367/Ticket_1.png)
2.  Once you have logged in you will be redirected to the Help Centre, click Submit a request in the top right.  
    ![aycdzendeskmainpicwithbox.jpg](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360053110454/aycdzendeskmainpicwithbox.jpg)
3.  On the Submit a request page you will need to fill out the necessary information such as the Subject, and Description of your issue. You can also provide any additional screenshots or log files that you believe may help describe your issue.  
    ![2019-12-14_16_56_11-Submit_a_request___AYCD.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360053986413/2019-12-14_16_56_11-Submit_a_request___AYCD.png)
4.  To view the status of an active ticket you can click the My activities by clicking the arrow next to your user in the top-right.  
    ![aycdzendesktickets.png](https://aycd.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360053986453/aycdzendesktickets.png)
